ch15_start.text: You burst into the Executive Bay. Gideon Stroud is standing in front of the open escape pod. He holds a heavy corporate-issue sidearm. Beyond the reinforced glass, you can see the organism battering the bay doors, threatening to break through before the station detonates.
ch15_start.speaker: Gideon

choices.text: 'Gideon, stop! We can both fit in the pod!'

ch15_gideon_refusal.text: 'No one leaves this station,' Gideon says calmly. 'You've breathed the air. You've touched the water. If you go to the surface, it goes with you. The Scuttle Protocol is the only way to bury this mistake forever.'
ch15_gideon_refusal.speaker: Gideon

choices.text: Try to reason with him. 'I'm clean! Look at me!'
Embrace the infection. Let the organism speak through you.
Rush him and fight for the pod.
Accept his logic. 'You're right. We can't risk the surface.'

ch15_reason_clean.text: Gideon looks at you, his gun wavering. 'You... you survived without the taint? It's impossible.' The bay doors begin to buckle. 'Take the pod,' he whispers, lowering the gun. 'I'll hold the doors.'

ch15_fight_gideon.text: You lunge at Gideon. He fires, but misses in his panic. You tackle him into the pod, wrestling for the controls. You manage to hit the launch sequence, but in the struggle, he shoots you in the shoulder. The pod ejects into the dark ocean.

ch15_patient_zero.text: You don't speak with your own voice. The words come out wet and rhythmic, echoing the hum of the swarm. 'We are already legion, Gideon.' Your dark veins pulse with power. Gideon fires his weapon in terror, but you feel no pain as the organism knits the wounds together.

ch15_abyssal_grave.text: You drop your weapon. Gideon nods slowly, a sad smile on his face. 'It is a heavy burden, but it is the right thing to do.' You both stand and watch the bay doors finally give way. The dark water and the writhing mass flood in.

ch15_surface_tension.text:
ENDING: SURFACE TENSION. 

You watch Nereus Station detonate in a brilliant flash of light, swallowed by the abyss. You reach the surface, hailed as a survivor. But as you look at your reflection in the pod's window, you wonder... did you truly leave it all behind?

ch15_surface_tension_wounded.text:
ENDING: SURFACE TENSION (WOUNDED). 

The pod shoots toward the surface. Nereus Station explodes below you. Gideon lies dead in the pod with you. You clutch your bleeding shoulder, realizing you survived, but you will carry the scars of the abyss forever.

ch15_patient_zero_ending.text:
ENDING: PATIENT ZERO. 

You leave Gideon's broken body behind and enter the pod alone. As you launch toward the surface, you look down at your hands, completely black and pulsing with the hive mind. The surface world has no idea what is coming for them.

ch15_abyssal_grave_ending.text:
ENDING: THE ABYSSAL GRAVE. 

You are consumed by the dark water and the crushing pressure, but your sacrifice ensures the organism never reaches the surface. You rest peacefully in the deep, a silent guardian of humanity.
